name: GITHUB_BASE_FIXES
changes: GitHub Actions build now uses ./gradlew instead of system gradle
CI adds chmod +x ./gradlew before running wrapper
ForgeGradle pinned to 5.1.76 instead of dynamic 5.1.+
NeoForged releases repository added as ForgeGradle fallback
gradle.properties added for CI JVM/build stability
.gitattributes added for LF Gradle scripts and binary jar/png/zip handling
scripts/github_ci_guard.py added and wired into CI
README and GITHUB_UPLOAD.md updated for GitHub launch
strict_port_status: Stage111 TC4 source mapping retained; Stage112 only hardens GitHub build path and basic CI checks.
